name: ogfx-market-telegram
description: Analyze supported markets with the OGFX engine and send actionable signals to Telegram.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze markets and deliver Telegram signals.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin that exposes OGFX market analysis tools and optional Telegram signal delivery for supported symbols.
defaultPrompt: Analyze BTCUSD and summarize the setup.
Scan BTCUSD, ETHUSD, and XAUUSD for signals.
Send the latest actionable setup to Telegram.
